calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Arnold Evje, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff

Defendant Morris Wong Pro Per present.

Case assigned to Department 504B Judge Pro Tem Susan Lew for settlement conference.

Parties stipulate as follows:

Plaintiff to have judgment for the possession and premises located at 610 Clement St. #2.
Lease is forfeited. Writ of possession will issue.
Plaintiff will stay the excution of the above writ until Oct. 15, 2003 5:00 p.m.

Back rent will be waived unless defendant does not vacate by Oct 15th date.
If defendant does not timely vacate, then Plaintiff will be entitled to $1,629.83 back rent and $27.30 damages daily from Sept. 1, 2003 thru Oct.l 15, 2003. Attorneys fees in the amount of $900.00 and costs.
Defendant to leave room in broom clean condition.
Return keys by October 15, 2003. Parties stipulate to general release.
Each side to bear own costs and attorneys fees. (As long as defendant timely vacates)
If defendant complies with the above terms the Judgment will be set aside and a dismissal with prejudice will be filed.
